---
title: "Target Index"
---

This index is generated from target manifests. These are planned theorem, proof, paper, experiment, and edge-problem targets. They are not proved theorem claims.

Click ids in the generated tables to move between targets, promoted theorem ids, dictionary terms, and source artifacts.

<div class="warning-box">
Target status is intentionally weaker than theorem status. A target becomes a proved theorem only after a theorem id, Lean declaration, manifest status, and checks support it.
</div>

## Phase IV Wide/Deep Targets

Source: `manifests/phase4_theorem_targets.yaml`

<div class="target-index" data-target-index="phase4"></div>

## Phase V Edge Targets

Source: `manifests/phase5_edge_targets.yaml`

<div class="target-index" data-target-index="phase5"></div>

## Phase VI Sweep Targets

Source: `manifests/phase6_sweep_targets.yaml`

<div class="target-index" data-target-index="phase6"></div>

<script type="module" src="widgets/shared/widget_base.js"></script>
